entries.description: Read spec, verdict (adjudication A), Q8 compat matrix, Sets 092/093 outcomes; confirmed prerequisites; provider keys present.

Routed architecture ruling (Opus tier 3) on the ensure-write seam; saved s1-ensure-write-seam-architecture.json. Adopted: atomic exclusive-create (wx/O_EXCL) closing TOCTOU + subsuming the symlink rule; Add-module routed through the canonical template; core-placement scaffold ensure-write; caller audit (both scaffold entrypoints explicit-action only).

gettingStartedHtml.js rebuilt to two sections (Build project structure + Define modules); removed old steps 2/3, the New-module button, the parallel checkbox + worktree note; Define-modules section carries the open-modules button + SAVE copy. client.js rewired; parallel/worktree machinery removed.

Re-derived the completion model: CompletionState/detectCompletion/computeGettingStarted shrank to structureBuilt; retired planPresent/sessionSetsPresent + the dead providerKeyPresent/pythonPresent/copilotCliPresent payload probes (092-deferred cleanup). Protocol GettingStartedActionId/Msg/Payload updated; watcher dropped docs/session-sets/* (recorded loss).

moduleAuthoring.ensureModulesManifest (atomic wx, skip-existing, never overwrites invalid); Add-module unified through MODULES_YAML_TEMPLATE; MODULES_YAML_HEADER removed. openModulesManifest.ts shared Open flow + dabbler.openModulesManifest command.
Work Explorer toolbar 'Open modules.yaml' button (package.json command + view/title menu + registration).

Scaffold ensure-write wired into scaffoldConsumerRepo (sole writer; not in the static bundle); both tiers, skip-existing. Verified exactly the explicit-action sites write; no-write-on-activation test-pinned.

Updated html/actions/detection/moduleAuthoring/scaffold suites for the two-section form + payload; added ensureModulesManifest matrix, no-write-on-read, openModulesManifestFlow flow, two-section render, scaffold skip-existing-manifest tests; watcher-inventory allowlist updated; Layer 3 Define-modules smoke added.

Registered Session 2 (claude/anthropic/claude-opus-4-8/high, per operator invocation; S1 routed rec was Fable-5 for cost — advisory). Read spec + S1 disposition/ai-assignment/next-orchestrator analysis; preload complete; keys present.

Routed architecture ruling (gpt-5-4/openai, tier 3, $0.20) on the two S2 design decisions; saved s2-parallel-and-d6-architecture.json. Adopted: (1a) Command-Palette escape hatch dabbler.generateParallelSessionSetPrompt (parallelHint setting flagged Major — sticky state contaminates common path); keep options.parallel/PARALLEL_GUIDANCE fed solely by the new command; regression test pins default prompt still documents prerequisites: (shelving != removal). (2a) D6 form button + palette command; ensureModulesManifest before building the pointer prompt in the shared command body only (never a render path).

D6 module-decomposition copy-prompt: new dabbler.copyModuleDecompositionPrompt command + Define-modules 'Copy AI decomposition prompt' form button (copy-decomposition-prompt gettingStartedAction) sharing one flow; ensureModulesManifest BEFORE building the pointer prompt (4th ensure-write site, explicit-action only); manifest header references the command. Unit tests: copyModuleDecompositionPrompt.test.ts + gettingStartedActions/Html + moduleAuthoring header pin; Layer-3 smoke asserts the new button. 239 relevant tests green, tsc clean.

Parallel-sets UI shelved with escape hatch (routed 1a): dabbler.generateParallelSessionSetPrompt Command-Palette command is now the sole live feeder of options.parallel/PARALLEL_GUIDANCE; primary paths omit it. prerequisites: machinery + worktree tooling untouched. Regression suite pins default omits guidance but still documents prerequisites:, hatch re-emits it, and the parallel-session commands stay contributed.

Docs pass: compat matrix marked shipped-state (Sets 092-094 landed); quick-start + both READMEs updated for the two-section form + Work Explorer rename; 092 rename residue swept across repository-reference/workflow/authoring-guide/CLAUDE/AGENTS/GEMINI/CONTRIBUTING (20 renames, 2 historical release-records preserved). getting-started.md.template teaching-doc rewrite DEFERRED to Set 095 (verdict-assigned onboarding rewrite); screenshots pending refresh — both recorded as pre-publish caveats.

Release prep: extension bumped 0.41.0->0.42.0 as the single 091-094 release-boundary VSIX; CHANGELOG omnibus 0.42.0 entry covering Sets 087+091-094, superseding the never-published 0.41.0 (086 folds in); publish runbook confirmed runnable + fully tag-driven/operator-gated (push vsix-v0.42.0; workflow verifies tag vs package.json; needs green Test). Extension-only — no coordinated router bump. UAT (suggested/non-gating): 092 human walks pending operator, comprehensive UX UAT re-cut is Set 095's (verdict); 094 surface Layer-2/3 covered — pre-publish UAT is operator-adjudicated.

Build+full suite green: compile clean, tsc clean, extension unit 1487, Playwright 26 (incl. two-section+D6 button smoke + no-write-on-activation E2E), pytest 2922/6 (unchanged — zero Python touched). Cross-provider verify (gpt-5-6, anthropic excluded): R1+R2 each 1 Major on the shipping README onboarding sequence (circular first-run path). Fixed in flight by tracing selectExplorerMode + documenting the palette-first path; operator adjudicated the fix as resolving at the 2-round cap (ISSUES_FOUND_RESOLVED_IN_FLIGHT).

Step 9 reorg review of project-guidance.md / lessons-learned.md: NO structural changes recommended. The README onboarding-sequence Major is a textbook L-064-8 instance (verify current-behavior doc claims against code before verification) — already active, cite it; admission test fails 'recent recurrence' for a first occurrence, so no new always-loaded lesson. Layer-3-before-close (L-064-12) applied (Playwright ran locally for the form button change). lessons_cited: L-064-8, L-064-12.
